text:
Hello!
i installed FreeBSD 6.1 on my server.
But there is no drivers for my ethernet interfaces!!!
My server motherboard
http://www.intel.com/design/servers/boards/s5000PAL/index.htm
So i can't find drivers for ethernet adapters integrated in this model.
Guys, i realy want to use FreeBSD!!!! HELP!!!!!!!!
